channel.title: AK Goldeneye Project
channel.description: Recent content on AK Goldeneye Project

item.title: Welcome to the Blog!
item.description:
This is the blog for the AK Goldeneye Project 2026 field season. This research has been made possible through collaborative efforts between the University of California, Davis, U.S. Army Corps of Engineers, and community members of the greater Fairbanks, Alaska area.

Stay tuned for upcoming posts!
